mainEntity.name: What metrics define successful AI search optimization in San Antonio?
mainEntity.text: What metrics define successful AI search optimization in San Antonio?

acceptedAnswer.text: Key metrics: Citation frequency (15%+), AI traffic share (20%), lead conversion from AI (12%). Track monthly.

suggestedAnswer.text: San Antonio: Use custom queries like 'SA truck accident lawyer.' Benchmark vs competitors; E-E-A-T scores above 80. Ties to billable hours increase.

name: Success Metrics for San Antonio AI GEO
description: Key metrics: Citation frequency (15%+), AI traffic share (20%), lead conversion from AI (12%). Track monthly.
